scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy

brand.Name: Monorepo Manager
brand.Tagline: Status, bulk operations, and ripple-publish across every module
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-monorepo-manager-webinterface-filled-light">
				<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z" fill="#2b9ea2"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-monorepo-manager-webinterface-filled-light)"><defs><mask id="_cr_7374"><rect x="0" y="0" width="96" height="96" fill="#fff"/>
						<circle cx="32" cy="48" r="32" fill="#000"/></mask></defs>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="32" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" mask="url(#_cr_7374)"/>
					<circle cx="32" cy="48" r="26" fill="#da8962" opacity="0.7"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">MMW</text>
	</svg>
